title: Bitter Sweet Symphony
why_this_song: Bitter Sweet Symphony by The Verve (1997) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Well, I've never prayed, but tonight I'm on my knees, yeah
I need to hear some sounds that recognize the pain in me, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "change" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "change" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ever" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ever" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: 'Cause it's a bitter sweet symphony, that's life

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Bitter Sweet Symphony" was released in 1997. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Bitter Sweet Symphony" foi lançada em 1997. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Bitter Sweet Symphony" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Bitter Sweet Symphony" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Bitter Sweet Symphony" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Bitter Sweet Symphony"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Bitter Sweet Symphony", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Bitter Sweet Symphony", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Verve one question about "Bitter Sweet Symphony", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Verve sobre "Bitter Sweet Symphony", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Bitter Sweet Symphony" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Bitter Sweet Symphony" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Bitter Sweet Symphony" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Bitter Sweet Symphony" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Bitter Sweet Symphony" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Bitter Sweet Symphony", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?
